@graph.description: Thujone is a monoterpene ketone best known for neuroactive and toxicity-relevant pharmacology in sage- and wormwood-related discussions. Its importance is driven more by receptor-level safety relevance than by positive human efficacy evidence.
@graph.name: thujone
